turns.assistantContent:
Dispatching 3 parallel agents to fix the agent files. Each agent handles a bounded slice of files.

**Batch 1 (Critical agents):** hiveminder, hiveq, architect — highest phantom count
**Batch 2 (Implementation agents):** hivemaker, hitea, hivehealer, hiveplanner
**Batch 3 (Remaining agents):** code-skeptic, hivexplorer, hiverd, hivefiver
